violations.text: Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Per PIC, order has already been placed for new thermometers. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. Per PIC, new test strips have already been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

Several foods in cold-hold unit was observed held at (50-55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Last lunch food was relocated to reach in unit to rapidly cool. Methods for keeping foods cold discussed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
Hot Hold door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Milk was observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was recently placed in unit and relocated. Milk must sit on ice packs in addition to being in cold rail. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024
Chicken was placed hot in the salad bar in covered containers. Chicken was uncovered and placed in the walk-in. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. PIC stated they are in the process of submitting application. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/11/2023
4 Dead mice were observed on 2 different glue traps in the dry storage area. Mice were removed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The floor next to the walk-in freezer was observed with food debris on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in sandwich prep area in the cafeteria . The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment to clean under equipment and shelves in area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2023
